name: Carol, the #1 Hero
description:
“Are you okay? Don’t worry! I’ll take care of you!”

You can’t believe it. The #1 hero is right here in front of you! It’s shocking how harmless she seems when in reality she is probably the most dangerous person in the world. What will you do with her? 

Tags:NSFW, ANY POV, Female, Superhero,
creator: RustsySpork
